name: Alejandro Olmedo
title: Intermediate Software Engineer | Backend Developer| Node.js · Cloud
summary: Results-driven Senior Software Engineer with 7+ years of experience designing and delivering scalable full-stack web applications. Proven track record in React, Node.js, and cloud-native architectures on AWS and GCP. Passionate about clean code, developer experience, and building systems that scale. Skilled collaborator with cross-functional teams in fast-paced, agile environments.

bullets: Led architecture and development of a real-time analytics dashboard serving 500k+ daily active users using React, TypeScript, and GraphQL.
Reduced API response time by 40% by migrating monolithic services to a Node.js microservices architecture deployed on AWS ECS.
Mentored 4 junior engineers through structured code reviews, pair programming sessions, and bi-weekly 1:1s.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions and Terraform, cutting deployment time from 45 minutes to under 8 minutes.
Built and maintained customer-facing React Native mobile app (iOS & Android) with 50k+ downloads.
Designed RESTful APIs and PostgreSQL schemas for a multi-tenant SaaS platform supporting 200+ enterprise clients.
Integrated third-party payment providers (Stripe, PayPal) and improved checkout conversion rate by 18%.
Developed responsive web applications for 10+ clients using HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, and Vue.js.
Collaborated with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs and improve accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA).

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science
